description: Create a custom Wazuh decoder named 'bastion-session' and two detection rules (IDs 100010 and 100011) to parse and alert on authentication events from a bastion host based on the sample log at '/home/ga/bastion_logs/sample_bastion.log'. The decoder must match the program name 'session_auth' and extract fields for user, srcip (from src_ip), action, status, and extra_data (reason). Rule 100010 (Level 8) must trigger when status is 'failed' (Description: 'Bastion host failed authentication') and Rule 100011 (Level 3) must trigger when status is 'success' (Description: 'Bastion host successful authentication'). Apply and verify the configuration.

metadata.test_log_line: Jan 15 10:25:01 bastion-gw session_auth[5236]: user=root src_ip=203.0.113.42 action=login status=failed reason="account_locked"
